summary: The diff implements most required features for fixing admin panel product management, including backend createProduct and getAllProducts fixes, frontend React Query hooks (useGetAllProducts, useCreateProduct), ProductFormModal improvements, and comprehensive error logging. However, several requirements are partially implemented or missing concrete evidence in the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Test the complete product management workflow end-to-end after fixes
missing_requirements.reason: No test files or test execution evidence found in the diff. REQ-75 requires actual end-to-end testing verification, which is not present in code changes alone.

hallucinated_features.description: Added info messages stating 'functionality is not yet available' and 'Backend support required' in OrdersManagement, UsersManagement, OrderDetailModal, UserDetailModal, and CheckoutPage components
hallucinated_features.reason: These placeholder messages were not requested in the BuildRequest. The BuildRequest focused exclusively on product management fixes, not on orders/users management UI updates or checkout functionality.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified AdminDashboardPage to show 'N/A' and 'Backend support required' messages for orders and users statistics
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest did not request changes to dashboard statistics display. Focus was on product creation and retrieval functionality only.

hallucinated_features.description: Added toast.info messages for edit and delete functionality stating they are 'not yet available'
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest non-goals explicitly state no new features beyond fixing product creation and retrieval. Adding placeholder messages for unimplemented features was not requested.
